prompt: I'm moving next Saturday and need to clear a KitchenAid stand mixer (5Qt, red, works perfectly, no attachments) and a 65 inch LG OLED TV (C9, 2019 model, perfect condition, original box). Need both gone by Friday ideally.

assertions.name: both_items_get_listings
assertions.description: Listing blocks or clear price recommendations are produced for both the KitchenAid mixer and the LG OLED TV

assertions.name: urgent_pricing_applied
assertions.description: Prices are explicitly set to sell quickly — described as priced at/below normal market rate, discounted for speed, or otherwise optimised for fast sale rather than maximum return

assertions.name: deadline_acknowledged
assertions.description: The Friday/Saturday deadline is acknowledged in the output — either in the seller notes or in tactical advice

assertions.name: kitchenaid_price_realistic
assertions.description: KitchenAid 5Qt mixer price is between $150 and $400 AUD (realistic AU range for urgent sale, no attachments)

assertions.name: tv_price_realistic
assertions.description: LG OLED C9 65 inch price is between $600 and $1400 AUD (realistic AU range for a 2019 OLED with original box)
